label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. So today must be July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So if today is July 28, 2002, then one week ago would be subtracting seven days from that date. Let me count backwards. July has 31 days, right? So starting from July 28, subtract one day each step: July 28 (today) July 27 (1 day ago) July 26 (2) July 25 (3) July 24 (4) July 23 (5) July 22 (6) July 21 (7 days ago) So one week ago from July 28 would be July 21, 2002. Let me check the options. Option E is 07/21/2002. That should be the correct answer. Let me make sure I didn't make a mistake. If today is the 28th, subtracting seven days gets us to the 21st. Yep, that
